name: supreme-overlord
description_fr: Quand le Pokémon entre sur le terrain, son Attaque\net son Attaque Spéciale augmentent légèrement\npour chaque allié mis K.O. auparavant.
description_en: When the Pokémon enters a battle, its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are slightly boosted for each of the allies in its party that have already been defeated.
